debug_info.goal:
x T : ℝ
hx : x > exp 50
hT : T ∈ Set.Ioo (3 * log x) (√x / 3)
⊢ Eψ x ≤ (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) (Set.Ioo (-T) T) fun ρ => ‖↑x ^ (ρ - 1) / ρ‖) + FKS.ε₁ x T

    · calc T < sqrt x / 3 := h2

    constructor

exact riemannZeta.explicit_formula_bound hx hT

           refine (div_lt_self_iff (by norm_num)).mpr ?_
           rw [← Sqrt.sqrt_lt_self_iff]

  · exact hT.2
